items.title: Before Trajan Langdon could make the type of deal Pistons fans want, he had to make a series of moves to put them in position to do so. One of them was picking up Paul Reed for the price of  a waiver claim.
items.author: Keith Langlois
items.body_excerpt:
Before Trajan Langdon could make the type of deal Pistons fans want, he had to make a series of moves to put them in position to do so. One of them was picking up Paul Reed for the price of  a waiver claim.

www.nba.com/pistons/news...

media.title: Pistons 2025-26 Rewind: B-ball Paul ready whenever, wherever and however he’s used
media.description: Reed signed a two-year contract after the 2024-25 season to remain with the Pistons with the second year reported as non-guaranteed.

items.title: A team that could build around Jared McCain and Paul Reed would be unstoppable
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: A team that could build around Jared McCain and Paul Reed would be unstoppable
